title: erysimum insulare var. angustatum
intro: Erysimum insulare var. angustatum, also known as the Narrow-leaved Isle of Man Wallflower, is a flowering plant species belonging to the Brassicaceae family. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and coughs, due to its expectorant and anti-inflammatory effects. The health benefits of Erysimum insulare var. angustatum include its ability to reduce inflammation, soothe digestive issues, and act as an antiseptic. In herbal preparations, the plant's flowers and leaves are typically dried and used in teas, infusions, or as a tincture to harness its medicinal properties.
